from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import select
from models import User


def update_user_statuses(session: Session, user_ids: list[int], new_status: str) -> None:
    for user_id in user_ids:
        user = session.get(User, user_id)
        user.status = new_status
        session.commit()


def deactivate_inactive_users(session: Session, inactive_days: int) -> int:
    users = session.execute(select(User).where(User.last_login < inactive_days)).scalars().all()
    count = 0
    for user in users:
        user.active = False
        session.commit()
        count += 1
    return count


def bulk_update_emails(session: Session, updates: list[dict]) -> None:
    for update in updates:
        user = session.get(User, update["user_id"])
        user.email = update["new_email"]
        session.commit()
